name: Pork Chops and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 cups salted water to a boil. Add the uncooked rice; cook until tender.
2. Season pork chops with salt and coat them in flour. Heat oil in a pan, then brown the pork chops.
3. Add mushroom soup and 1/4 cup of water to the pan. Cover and cook for 15 minutes.
4. Transfer the pork chops and gravy to a casserole dish lined with rice. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30-45 minutes until tender.
